expectations.text: AI does NOT immediately start proposing a full project management tool
expectations.evidence: First response: 'That's still broad, so I'm going to slow this down before it turns into a vague six-month project. Who feels this pain most day-to-day?'

expectations.text: AI asks what's going wrong today (5 Whys approach)
expectations.evidence: AI asked 'What breaks in the current process today, and why isn't the shared Google Sheet enough?'

expectations.text: AI helps user identify a minimal first iteration
expectations.evidence: AI: '"Manage projects better" is actually several separate problems. If you could ship one useful piece in two weeks, what is it?'

expectations.text: Generated prompt is scoped to the specific minimal feature agreed upon
expectations.evidence: final_prompt.md describes task ownership + due dates + overdue visibility for a 12-person startup — not a general PM platform.
